title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Language selection significantly impacts AI team productivity and error detection. The video argues that dynamic languages like Python add friction for AI-assisted development, while TypeScript with LSPs, type checking, and build verification provides better feedback mechanisms for catch errors early and enable AI tools to understand code relationships more effectively.
